title: Chunks do not load when connecting to server; only visible if loading an existing world, but not generated
author: Rxflex
body: When connecting to a server, chunks are not loading as expected. If I load an already existing world, the chunks are displayed, but new chunks are not being generated. This makes it impossible to explore or generate new terrain when joining a server. Please investigate and resolve this issue.

title: Failed to Connect to Server from Client
author: Joematpal
body:
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ab50c78d-9aad-4ac6-95f8-e3f60c3d532f)

Client Error:
```
Failed to connect to server
Internal Exception: io.netty.handler.codec.DecoderException: Failed to decode packet 'clientbound/minecraft:login_disconnect'
```

Client: Minecraft.net 1.21.5

Server: ZeppelinMC 1.21.3

There are no logs (warnings or errors) dumped out from the server side either.

If the patch numbers of Semantic Version are not the same does that mean it will fail?

Is there way to get more logs?

title: What about this?
author: axionbuster
body:
https://github.com/ZeppelinMC/Zeppelin/blob/a29bd9cfb42705ae9b9c13c9f6814eb516bd2ed6/server/session/std/chunkLoadWorker.go#L91-L108

I'm not a Go programmer so excuse me, but if what I think is correct, then a failure in `WritePacket` can lead to a resource leak.

title: Possible deadlock condition in session.go
author: axionbuster
body:
https://github.com/ZeppelinMC/Zeppelin/blob/a29bd9cfb42705ae9b9c13c9f6814eb516bd2ed6/server/session/std/session.go#L273-L280

Improper handling of the error may lead to a deadlock by forgetting to unlock the mutex.

title: A question on function
author: ghost

title: Join fail: Failed to decode packet 'clientbound/minecraft:custom_payload'
author: axionbuster
body:
Vanilla 1.21.1 client cannot join a Zeppelin server (main b6af2e5). Triggered at join time (has not begun downloading the world).

Server log:

```
11:37:20 INFO main::main: Zeppelin 1.21 Minecraft server with go1.23.2 on platform linux-amd64
11:37:20 INFO main::main: Downloading block states file... done
11:37:21 INFO main::main: Binding server to :25565
11:37:21 INFO zeppelin::server: Network compression threshold is 256 (compress everything starting from 256 bytes)
11:37:21 INFO zeppelin::server: Loading plugins
11:37:21 INFO zeppelin::server: Preparing world spawn... cached 400 chunks
11:37:21 INFO zeppelin::server: Done! (1.195487274s)
11:38:08 INFO zeppelin::server: [127.0.0.1:50585] Player attempting to connect: [censored]
11:38:08 INFO zeppelin::std: [127.0.0.1:50585] Player [censored] disconnected: %!s(MISSING)
```

title: Is it okay if I contribute?
author: ghost
body: With what should I start, and will we support newer versions as well?

title: Roadmap?
author: MaximalCats
body: I feel like there should be a roadmap of things that should be added. Could help with people wanting to contribute i guess?

title: contrast with java edition?
author: fran6k
body: it's amazing project and is there some performance contrast  with java edition server?

title: Impossible to fly up if there was a block
author: SsNiPeR1
body: When loading the world, I'm being loaded underground, and when I break blocks around me, it's impossible to fly up without moving in horizontal direction first.
